variables.notes: Candidate list misses the best recurring interest row: 'Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value'. Used that plus lease interest to avoid broader 'Financial Expense', which includes Foreign Exchange Gain/Loss - Non-Business and would overstate XINT. Manual review recommended because one selected row is outside the provided candidates and is labeled as a balancing value, though semantically it appears to represent core interest expense. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
